productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Formal Black Formal Shoes
description: Take formal dressing to the next level with this leather loafer from red tape. The full grain leather lends it a natural finish, while the designer vamp makes it a fabulous easy wear formal shoe.UpperFull-grain leather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleSlip-on style for ease of wearConcealed elastic gore on the midfoot with a midfoot strap for a customised FitLeather inner lining and fabric lining in the forefoot region for ultimate sweat-free comfort Mock zipper design on the midfoot and back heel for enhanced styleMidsoleErgonomically curved footbed with a leather lining for sweat-free comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a wooden-texture and horizontal grooves on the back heel for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
